description:
Control BluOS and Sonos multi-room audio players on your network
BlueSound Controller lets you discover and control BluOS and Sonos audio players on your local network.

Features:
- Automatic network scanning to find all BluOS and Sonos players
- Playback control: play, pause, stop, next, previous
- Volume control with live updates
- Access and play presets/favorites from your players
- Switch between multiple players seamlessly
- Transfer radio streams between players (Sonos↔Sonos, Sonos→BluOS, BluOS→BluOS)
- Player grouping for multi-room audio
- Multi-language support: English, German, Swahili
- Light and dark theme
- Auto-refresh of playback status

No cloud account required. All communication stays on your local network.
